samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Divide the first operand by the second operand.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[15:0]">The first operand.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">The second operand.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">Result of the division.</output>
        <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">Remainder of the division.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <lines>
            <line id="state_0">Initialize the variables.</line>
            <line id="state_1">Compare the bits of the first operand and the second operand.</line>
            <line id="state_2">Subtract the second operand from the first operand.</line>
            <line id="state_3">Update the result and the first operand.</line>
            <line id="state_4">Update the odd.</line>
            <line id="state_5">Update the first operand.</line>
        </lines>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <lines>
            <line>Always block triggered by any change in the first operand or the second operand.</line>
            <line>if (reset)</line>
            <line>    a_reg = 0;</line>
            <line>    b_reg = 0;</line>
            <line>else</line>
            <line>    a_reg = A;</line>
            <line>    b_reg = B;</line>
            <line>state = state_0;</line>
            <line>}</line>
            <line>Always block triggered by any change in the first operand or the second operand.</line>
            <line>if (reset)</line>
            <line>    a_reg = 0;</line>
            <line>    b_reg = 0;</line>
            <line>    state = state_0;</line>
            <line>}</line>
            <line>case (state)</line>
            <line>state_0:</line>
            <line>    Initialize the variables.</line>
            <line>    state = state_1;</line>
            <line>state_1:</line>
            <line>    if (a_reg[15:8] >= b_reg)</line>
            <line>        result = 1;</line>
            <line>        a_reg[15:8] = a_reg[15:8] - b_reg;</line>
            <line>    else</line>
            <line>        result = 0;</line>
            <line>    state = state_2;</line>
            <line>state_2:</line>
            <line>    Subtract the second operand from the first operand.</line>
            <line>    state = state_3;</line>
            <line>state_3:</line>
            <line>    Update the result and the first operand.</line>
            <line>    state = state_4;</line>
            <line>state_4:</line>
            <line>    Update the odd.</line>
            <line>    state = state_5;</line>
            <line>state_5:</line>
            <line>    Update the first operand.</line>
            <line>    state = state_1;</line>
            <line>}</line>
        </lines>
    </implementation>
</module>
